facts:
CANON_GUARDIAN: CANON_GUARDIAN has Vertex AI as a deployment option.
CANON_GUARDIAN belongs to the 'Ã crÃ©er en premier / Top 5 founders' family of agents.
CANON_GUARDIAN is deployed on Vertex AI or locally.
CANON_GUARDIAN has the Claude Code skill 'freeze-guardian (reduced)'.
The freeze-guardian Claude Code skill is mapped as a reduced skill for the CANON_GUARDIAN agent.
CANON_GUARDIAN is described in the `OBSIDIA_TOUS_LES_AGENTS.docx` document.
CANON_GUARDIAN is a Top 5 founding agent.
CANON_GUARDIAN is the guardian of the canon Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN belongs to the Fondateurs family, designated as 'Ã crÃ©er en premier (top 5)'.
CANON_GUARDIAN protects the canon Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Obsidia.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for X-108.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for AVDR.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for ACP.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Freeze.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Kernel.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for MÃ©moire fractale.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for 34 arbres.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Frise humaine.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Balance exponentielle.
CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Calibration procÃ©durale.

Domain surfaces: Domain surfaces are the periphery or QA layer (Sigma) of the Obsidia architecture, which wraps the kernel without modifying it. Examples include bank, trading, aviation, connectors, and field POCs.

GRAPH_BUILDER: GRAPH_BUILDER is initially deployed on Vertex AI.
GRAPH_BUILDER belongs to the 'Ã crÃ©er en premier / Top 5 founders' family of agents.
GRAPH_BUILDER is initially deployed on Vertex AI, then locally.
GRAPH_BUILDER has the Claude Code skill 'graph-calibrator-obsidia (composite)'.
The source documentation for GRAPH_BUILDER is OBSIDIA_TOUS_LES_AGENTS.docx.
GRAPH_BUILDER constructs the Obsidia graph from provided memory cards.
GRAPH_BUILDER belongs to the Fondateurs family, which is categorized as 'Ã crÃ©er en premier (top 5)'.
GRAPH_BUILDER has a System Prompt.
The graph-calibrator-obsidia Claude Code skill is a composite skill that involves the GRAPH_BUILDER agent.
The Kernel / proof layer includes RFC3161.
The Proof stack includes RFC3161 timestamp anchor.
The Kernel / proof layer includes RFC3161.
The Proof stack includes RFC3161 timestamp anchor.

Kernel: CANON_GUARDIAN verifies name collisions for Kernel.
PROOF_SENTINEL produces a 'Rapport preuve' that includes invariant touched, cause, and rupture level.
PROOF_SENTINEL produces a 'Rapport Proof Sentinel'.
PROOF_SENTINEL produces a 'Rapport preuve' that includes invariant touched, cause, and rupture level.
PROOF_SENTINEL produces a 'Rapport Proof Sentinel'.
The Kernel / proof layer includes Lean.
The Kernel / proof layer includes TLA+.
The Kernel / proof layer includes Merkle.
The Kernel / proof layer includes seal.
The Kernel / proof layer includes RFC3161.
Sigma wraps the Kernel / proof layer without modifying it.
`read-only-inspector` is the mandatory first step before any modification on KERNEL.
The Mandatory response header includes KERNEL as a layer option.

Lean: Lean is related to proof verification and CI integration, specifically in the context of distinguishing CI false-red from real invariant rupture, according to the PROOF_SENTINEL agent's function.
PROOF_SENTINEL monitors Lean.
The Kernel / proof layer includes Lean.
The Proof stack includes Lean 4.
The Proof stack includes Merkle root + seal.
The Kernel / proof layer includes Lean.
The Proof stack includes Lean 4.
The Proof stack includes Merkle root + seal.
proofs/lean/** contains formal proof sources for Lean 4.
